contract.summary: navigation V1 Taxi 静态骨架（TaxiNode / TaxiPath + TraversedUiMap 序列）

joins: taxinodes 提供 Taxi 节点名称与世界坐标
taxipath 提供静态 Taxi 路线
uimapassignment + uimap 提供静态 UiMap 覆盖关系，用于恢复节点落点和经过地图序列
select: nodes_raw：TaxiNode 基础字段（ID / Name / MapID / Pos / Flags）
edges_raw：TaxiPath 基础字段（PathID / FromTaxiNode / ToTaxiNode）
supplemental：按静态覆盖关系补齐 UiMapID / WalkClusterKey / TraversedUiMapIDs / TraversedUiMapNames
where: Taxi 路线不再只保留旧 public transport 候选；V1 统一纳入可静态恢复的 TaxiPath
经过地图序列必须导出为 Lua 数组，不允许退化成逗号字符串
query.row_granularity: nodes_raw 一行代表一个 TaxiNode；edges_raw 一行代表一条 TaxiPath

nodes_raw.sql: SELECT CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER) AS taxi_node_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(tn.Name_lang), ''), 'Taxi Node #' || CAST(tn.ID AS TEXT)) AS node_name, CAST(COALESCE(tn.ContinentID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_id, CAST(COALESCE(tn.Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS pos_x, CAST(COALESCE(tn.Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS pos_y, CAST(COALESCE(tn.Pos_2, 0) AS REAL) AS pos_z, CAST(COALESCE(tn.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS node_flags, CAST(COALESCE(tn.ConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(tn.VisibilityConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS visibility_condition_id FROM taxinodes tn WHERE CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER)

query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 TaxiNode 原始记录

edges_raw.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER)) AS edge_index, CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER) AS path_id, CAST(tp.FromTaxiNode AS INTEGER) AS from_taxi_node_id, CAST(tp.ToTaxiNode AS INTEGER) AS to_taxi_node_id FROM taxipath tp WHERE CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(tp.FromTaxiNode AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(tp.ToTaxiNode AS INTEGER) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER)

where: 起点 / 终点 TaxiNode 有效
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条 TaxiPath 原始记录

structure.lua_shape: Toolbox.Data.NavigationTaxiEdges = { schemaVersion, sourceMode, generatedAt, nodes, edges }

change_log.summary: 初始契约：Taxi 来源侧只导旧 public transport 候选
V1 改为导出统一 Taxi 静态骨架：补齐 UiMap 落点、WalkClusterKey 与 TraversedUiMap 数组
